title: Alinea Loading Screen
description: Replaces the Mojang loading screen with the Alinea logo!
body:
This pack is made for use on [Alinea.gg](https://alinea.gg/), although it can be used however you wish.

This resource pack simply replaces the default Mojang Studios loading screen with the Alinea logo.

**You do need the [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) mod to see this**
